statement: HBM3e supply constraints are extending H200 and GB200 NVL72 custom-config lead times to 36-52 weeks.
why: Lead times lengthened by HBM3e scarcity indicate a supply bottleneck for high-end NVIDIA systems.

impact.mechanism: HBM3e constraints lengthen delivery lead times, tightening effective supply of H200/GB200 systems.

evidence.source: Spheron Blog - GPU Cloud News 2026 (release cadence + lead times)
evidence.excerpt: HBM3e supply constraints are extending H200 and GB200 NVL72 custom-config lead times to 36-52 weeks.
